browseros.name: BrowserOS
browseros.description: Native macOS browser automation - full Chrome DevTools Protocol, screenshot, JavaScript evaluation, file upload/download

newest-desktop-control.name: Newest Desktop Control
newest-desktop-control.description: Cross-platform desktop automation MCP gateway: screenshots, mouse, keyboard, clipboard, app launch, terminal, file, window activation, Android ADB control, and Codex Computer Use detection. Node.js stdio JSON-RPC server.
